backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (user profiles, couples, planner entries, journal entries, vision board) and state maps for a couples planning/journaling app, with authorization mixin included.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, key changes, and notable implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Future Us' that mounts the React app at the #root div via the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with all page routes, a navigation bar, profile setup modal, couple mode badge, and authentication controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend data operations including user profiles, couple management, vision board, daily planner, and journal entries. Also exports a custom CoupleCreateErrorException class for typed error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm cream/amber color palette in both light and dark modes. Also defines reusable component utility classes like card-warm, section-title, and label-warm.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/CoupleSettings.tsx: Page component for managing couple connections, allowing users to link with a partner via Principal ID or dissolve an existing couple relationship. Handles error states for already-linked principals and displays current connection status.
frontend/src/pages/DailyPlanner.tsx: Page component for a daily planner with date navigation, supporting mood tracking, tasks, schedule items, and water intake for the current user. Also includes a read-only partner view tab showing the partner's planner entry for the selected date.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a daily inspirational quote, weekly task progress, vision board goal summaries, and navigation shortcuts to other app sections. Uses multiple query hooks to aggregate data from the planner and vision board.
frontend/src/pages/JournalSection.tsx: Journal page with four tabbed journal types (daily, emotional, night reflection, growth) and date navigation for writing and viewing entries. Includes a partner view tab that shows the partner's journal entries in read-only mode.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyPlanner.tsx: React page for a monthly planner that lets users manage goals, important dates, budgets, moods, and journal entries for a given month, with a read-only partner view fetched via couple-aware queries.
frontend/src/pages/VisionBoard.tsx: React page displaying a vision board where users can create, edit, delete, and track progress on categorized life goals, with a read-only tab showing the partner's goals.
frontend/src/pages/WeeklyPlanner.tsx: React page for a weekly planner supporting priorities, habit tracking, tasks, and reflections per ISO week, with navigation controls and a read-only partner view.
frontend/src/pages/YearlyPlanner.tsx: React page for a yearly planner covering word-of-the-year, major goals, vision images, and habit tracking across months, with a read-only partner view and year navigation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (cream, amber, rose, taupe, pastel-brown, sidebar, chart), border radii, box shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, feature requests, and status; currently has one pending task (AR-1) to update only the instructional/helper text inside the 'Add Milestone' dialog on the VisionBoard page without changing any other logic or styling.
